room.caption: [Vault3] This was one of the harder levels to make because I didn't want to break the atmosphere.

instance.creationCode: vaultString=" You will need all of these."
vaultString=" I will take everything you love away from you."
maxChain=19 maxSwing=50 swingSpeed=1.5 newMid=oZapTrapRed newSpriteMid=sBRFCrushingSpikeRed newEnd=oZapTrapRed newSpriteEnd=sBRFCrushingSpikeRed
maxChain=28 maxSwing=50 swingSpeed=1 newMid=oZapTrapRed newSpriteMid=sBRFCrushingSpikeRed newEnd=oZapTrapRed newSpriteEnd=sBRFCrushingSpikeRed

x+=8;y+=8 sprite_index=sZeldaMegaphone soundToPlay=global.snd_HeartPiece stringToShow="You found the [Megaphone of Slight Relevance]." fadingTime=70 boxSize=1
if global.gameProgress>=2220 {instance_destroy()}
